title: DTCG Format Schema
description: JSON Schema for the Design Tokens Community Group (DTCG) Format specification.

$schema.description: URI reference to this JSON schema.
$schema.$comment: $schema is not part of the official DTCG specification.

$description.description: A plain text description of the group

$extends.description: Reference to another group to inherit tokens and properties from

tokenOrGroupName.title: Token or Group Name
tokenOrGroupName.description: Valid token/group names: must not start with $ and must not contain {, }, or .

jsonPointerReference.title: JSON Pointer Reference
jsonPointerReference.description: JSON Pointer reference (RFC 6901) to a location in the document (e.g., '#/path/to/target')

jsonPointerReferenceObject.title: JSON Pointer Reference Object
jsonPointerReferenceObject.description: Object containing a JSON Pointer reference for property-level references

tokenValueReference.title: Token Value Reference
tokenValueReference.description: A reference to a token value using either curly brace syntax or JSON Pointer syntax

https://www.designtokens.org/schemas/202.title: TokenType
https://www.designtokens.org/schemas/202.description: A token type in the DTCG specification

https://www.designtokens.org/schemas/202.title: Token
https://www.designtokens.org/schemas/202.description: A token in the DTCG specification

$value.description: The token's value - can be a direct value or a reference to another token using curly brace syntax (e.g., '{token.name}'). Mutually exclusive with $ref.

$description.description: A plain text description of the token

allOf.description: Tokens cannot define both $value and $ref; they must choose exactly one form of reference or direct value.

https://www.designtokens.org/schemas/202.title: Color Value
https://www.designtokens.org/schemas/202.description: Value schema for color type tokens. Represents a color in a specific color space.

colorSpace.description: The color space or color model used to represent the color

components.description: Array of color components. The number and meaning of components depend on the color space. Each component can be a number or the 'none' keyword.

alpha.description: The alpha (transparency) value of the color. 0 is fully transparent, 1 is fully opaque. If omitted, defaults to 1.

hex.description: Optional fallback value in 6-digit CSS hex color notation (e.g., '#ff00ff'). Must be 6 digits to avoid conflicts with the alpha value.
hex.$comment: Only JSON Pointer references (not curly brace references) are allowed for hex because no string token type exists in the specification that could be referenced with curly braces.

zeroToOneComponent.title: Zero to One Component
zeroToOneComponent.description: A color component normalized to the range [0-1] (e.g., RGB values, XYZ values)

hueComponent.title: Hue Component
hueComponent.description: Hue angle from 0 up to (but not including) 360 degrees

unboundedComponent.title: Unbounded Component
unboundedComponent.description: A color component with no numeric bounds (e.g., A and B in LAB/OKLAB color spaces)

rgbComponents.title: RGB Components
rgbComponents.description: Array of RGB color components [Red, Green, Blue], each normalized to the range [0-1]

xyzComponents.title: XYZ Components
xyzComponents.description: Array of XYZ color components [X, Y, Z], each normalized to the range [0-1]

https://www.designtokens.org/schemas/202.title: Dimension Value
https://www.designtokens.org/schemas/202.description: Value schema for dimension type tokens. Represents an amount of distance in a single dimension in the UI, such as a position, width, height, radius, or thickness.

value.description: An integer or floating-point value representing the numeric value.

unit.description: Unit of distance. Supported values: 'px' (idealized pixel, equivalent to dp on Android and pt on iOS), 'rem' (multiple of system's default font size).

https://www.designtokens.org/schemas/202.title: Font Family Value
https://www.designtokens.org/schemas/202.description: Value schema for fontFamily type tokens. Represents a font name or an array of font names (ordered from most to least preferred).

oneOf.description: An array of font names, ordered from most to least preferred

https://www.designtokens.org/schemas/202.title: Font Weight Value
https://www.designtokens.org/schemas/202.description: Value schema for fontWeight type tokens. Represents a font weight as per the OpenType wght tag specification. Lower numbers represent lighter weights, higher numbers represent thicker weights.

https://www.designtokens.org/schemas/202.title: Duration Value
https://www.designtokens.org/schemas/202.description: Value schema for duration type tokens. Represents the length of time in milliseconds an animation or animation cycle takes to complete.

value.description: An integer or floating-point value representing the numeric value.

https://www.designtokens.org/schemas/202.title: Cubic Bezier Value
https://www.designtokens.org/schemas/202.description: Value schema for cubicBezier type tokens. Represents how the value of an animated property progresses towards completion over the duration of an animation, effectively creating visual effects such as acceleration, deceleration, and bounce.

xCoordinate.title: X Coordinate
xCoordinate.description: X coordinate of control point (must be between 0 and 1)

yCoordinate.title: Y Coordinate
yCoordinate.description: Y coordinate of control point (can be any real number)

https://www.designtokens.org/schemas/202.title: Number Value
https://www.designtokens.org/schemas/202.description: Value schema for number type tokens. Numbers can be positive, negative and have fractions. Example uses are gradient stop positions or unitless line heights.

https://www.designtokens.org/schemas/202.title: Stroke Style Value
https://www.designtokens.org/schemas/202.description: Value schema for strokeStyle type tokens. Represents the style applied to lines or borders.

oneOf.description: Pre-defined stroke style values with the same meaning as CSS line style values

dashArray.description: Array of dimension values specifying lengths of alternating dashes and gaps

lineCap.description: Line cap style, same meaning as SVG stroke-linecap attribute

https://www.designtokens.org/schemas/202.title: Border Value
https://www.designtokens.org/schemas/202.description: Value schema for border type tokens. Represents a border style.

width.description: The width or thickness of the border

https://www.designtokens.org/schemas/202.title: Transition Value
https://www.designtokens.org/schemas/202.description: Value schema for transition type tokens. Represents an animated transition between two states.

delay.description: The time to wait before the transition begins

timingFunction.description: The timing function of the transition

https://www.designtokens.org/schemas/202.title: Shadow Value
https://www.designtokens.org/schemas/202.description: Value schema for shadow type tokens. Represents a shadow style.

oneOf.description: Array of shadow objects and/or references to shadow tokens

offsetX.description: The horizontal offset that shadow has from the element it is applied to

offsetY.description: The vertical offset that shadow has from the element it is applied to

blur.description: The blur radius that is applied to the shadow

spread.description: The amount by which to expand or contract the shadow

inset.description: Whether this shadow is inside the containing shape (inner shadow) rather than a drop shadow (default: false)

https://www.designtokens.org/schemas/202.title: Gradient Value
https://www.designtokens.org/schemas/202.description: Value schema for gradient type tokens. Represents a color gradient.

color.description: The color value at the stop's position on the gradient

position.description: The position of the stop along the gradient's axis (range [0, 1]). Values outside this range are clamped.

https://www.designtokens.org/schemas/202.title: Typography Value
https://www.designtokens.org/schemas/202.description: Value schema for typography type tokens. Represents a typographic style.

lineHeight.description: The vertical spacing between lines of typography (interpreted as a multiplier of fontSize)

https://www.designtokens.org/schemas/202.title: Group or Token
https://www.designtokens.org/schemas/202.description: A group or a token in the DTCG specification. A token is identified by the presence of a $value property, while a group is any object without a $value property.

https://www.designtokens.org/schemas/202.title: Group
https://www.designtokens.org/schemas/202.description: A group in the DTCG specification

$description.description: A plain text description of the group

$extends.description: Reference to another group to inherit tokens and properties from
